programs.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programs.desc: Joanna shares her love of Mexican food, preparing a feast for the whole family; the menu includes delicious Spinach Enchiladas with a side of Mexican Rice and Charro Beans, Queso Blanco, Fresh Tomato Salsa and Churro Cookies.

programs.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programs.desc: Joanna shares her all-time favorite recipes and the family stories that accompany them, including chicken cordon bleu, gruyère potato casserole, arugula and dried cherry salad and peanut butter pie with chocolate crust.

programs.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines

programs.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.desc: A couple finds a fixer-upper in Wisconsin that overlooks Lake Michigan, and they're doing all the renovation work themselves; he's a contractor with experience renovating properties, and she's ready to join him and get her hands dirty.
